---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What is frustrating or missing?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Which layer does this affect?

- [ ] Capture (keep.md, Obsidian Web Clipper, sources)
- [ ] Processing (pipeline, Claude Code agent, MCP servers)
- [ ] Storage (FalkorDB, Graphiti, vault, schema)
- [ ] Access (web UI, Telegram bot, API)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, Tailscale, deployment)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or related issues that help explain the request.
